title: Postman HTTP request examples!
excerpt:
Hello monday builder! 
We have released a collection of Postman HTTP request examples to help out community :muscle: 
You can find the collection here. 
Let us know what you think! 
Cheers, 
Matias

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello monday builder!

We have released a collection of Postman HTTP request examples to help out community

You can find the collection here.

Let us know what you think!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml: Great initiative. Well done to the team

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
Nice start!

It would be really nice if they were built around the GraphQL Schema, and used postman in GraphQL mode, built with variables!

Reach out if you have questions or need assistance on that!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello @anon29275264! We have a few examples written on GraphQL mode and with variables, but we will be adding more examples eventually!

posts.author: StrictLine (StrictLine)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Matias.Monday,
you might have misundertood @anon29275264 : he and now I meant to have a GraphQL Schema additionally (beyond the samples), so Postman can guide the developer upon writing the GraphQL code.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @StrictLine!

I misunderstood indeed!

We will take a look into it

Thanks for clarifying!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: Yup thats what I meant. Matias, check your email, i sent you a postman link to one already working.

posts.author: StrictLine (StrictLine)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Matias,
I appreciate your patience on understanding my concern. Today I’ve opened Postman with my GraphQL queries and “Schema fetched” shows up in the editor and auto-completion seems to work.

Good job! Thanks again!

Regards,
Miki
